claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Fixed the installer Codex config writer so malformed carriage returns cannot corrupt <machine-local-path> Added CRLF normalization before TOML block rewriting, byte-level bare CR checks after write, DinoBrain TOML block shape validation, and a regression case that starts from a malformed config containing CRCRLF and bare CR. Bumped DinoBrain to v2.2.1 and pushed main/tag.
